data.body: e4df CLOSE blocked by completion-verifier (criterion 4): (1) rollout note not in code, (2) no test exercises HMAC-verify post-extension. Remediated in change 660 (stack surgery: amend 660 + cherry-pick 664; Change-Ids preserved I6b3d/I0866): added rollout note to opcert.py module docstring; added assert verify_signature(kind) certified to the additive-invariance test. Also fixed stale 'API STUB' docstring line. 23 affected tests pass, lint clean. Re-pushed 660+664. 660/664 CI re-running on new patchsets -> will close e4df after 660 Verified+1 (completion gate should now pass). 649/650/660(prev) were green; 664 had a Verified -1 to diagnose. ee0b r4 review running (bqcv56t2y).
